title: Multiple times zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out via circle button remains stable across all screens on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Locate and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
4. On the QSG screen, locate the circle button (zoom control).
5. Tap the circle button multiple times to zoom in.
6. Verify the QSG content zooms in properly after each tap.
7. Tap the circle button multiple times to zoom out.
8. Verify the QSG content zooms out properly after each tap.
9. Navigate through all available screens/pages within the QSG.
10. Repeat steps 5–8 on each QSG screen/page.
11. Observe the app for any crashes, freezes, or UI glitches during the zoom operations.
expected: The app remains stable with no crashes or freezes. The zoom in/out functionality works correctly across all QSG screens when the circle button is used multiple times.
